name: Indonesian Shredded Spicy Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. The day before cooking, simmer the meat in water with a bit of salt until tender.
2. Store the cooked meat overnight in the refrigerator.
3. The following day, shred the beef into small strips using your fingers.
4. In a bowl, mix together garlic, brown sugar, Laos paste, coriander powder, tamarind juice, and salt.
5. Add the mixture to the shredded meat and stir well to combine.
6. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat. Fry the meat and spices until deeply browned and crisp.
7. In a separate step, fry the sliced onion until deep brown.
8. Sprinkle the fried onions on top of the seasoned beef and serve with rice.
